content.speakerText: So to recap — you’ll join feedback sessions, aim for the cert, and I’ll set up mentorship. Sound good?
content.speakerTextCn: 总结一下：你参加反馈会、考认证，我安排导师，这样可以吗？
expectedAnswers: Perfect — thanks for the clarity and support!
That works for me. I’ll send a follow-up email to confirm.
Sounds good! I’m ready to get started.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表示认可并确认共识
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合职场口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 clarity, support, follow-up 等关键词

content.speakerText: Thanks again for your hard work this year — looking forward to next one!
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢你今年的付出，期待明年一起继续！
expectedAnswers: Thank you for the opportunity — I’m excited to grow here!
Appreciate it! I’ll keep pushing and do even better next year.
Thanks so much! Looking forward to working with you again.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达感谢并积极回应未来合作
语言准确性：是否避免消极或不相关词汇
表达自然度：是否使用地道口语表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 opportunity, grow, pushing, looking forward 等关键词

content.speakerText: I’m glad we could align on the next steps. Let’s close this meeting here.
content.speakerTextCn: 很高兴我们达成了下一步共识，我们就此结束会议吧。
expectedAnswers: Absolutely — thanks for your guidance. Have a great day!
Thanks for wrapping this up clearly. I’ll follow up by EOD.
Great meeting! Looking forward to implementing these actions.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌结束并表达感谢或后续行动
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的结束语和时态
表达自然度：是否避免生硬或过度随意的表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 align, wrap up, follow up, looking forward 等场景关键词
